title: Extraterrestrial enthusiasts hold UFO Day in Buckhannon
description: BUCKHANNON, W.Va. — The very first Buckhannon UFO Day was held in downtown Buckhannon Saturday afternoon.

title: Red orbs, orange fireballs, and the return of the foo fighters – why new UAP videos released by the U.S. government feel hauntingly familiar
